meta.title: The Future of India-U.S. Defense Collaboration
meta.description: Hudson Institute and Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce and Industry host an event on the future of India- U.S. defense collaboration. Panelists included Aparna Pande, Doug Feith, Subodh Rajendra Babu, Jayant Patil, Col.  H.S. Shankar, and Michael Pillsbury. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
